advantages: Reproducible, reviewable notebooks others can trust and rerun.
Extracted modules are testable and reusable across notebooks and apps.
Stripped outputs make diffs and PRs readable.
Secrets and large data stay out of shared files.
disadvantages: Extra discipline and tooling (nbstripout, jupytext) to set up.
Refactoring cells into modules takes time mid-exploration.
Stripping outputs loses inline results unless rerun.
Team-wide consistency requires agreed conventions and hooks.
